specialty.meaning: self-DoT (enemy's own HP drains over time)
specialty.param_note: Param_2 = HP lost per tick, Param_3 = tick interval in ENGINE frames (60fps); the game DISPLAYS at 30fps so [_,100,30] = 100 HP / 30 engine frames = 100 HP / 15 displayed frames. user-confirmed.

specialty.meaning: aura range / area-of-effect radius (for the enemy's aura effect)
specialty.param_note: Param_2 = radius. NOT a DoT itself -- it just defines the area the paired effect (e.g. DoT id 19, or a buff) applies to. Grows to a huge value to make the aura global (Amon berserk Param_2=2000 = DoT全体). 868/1043 configs have 18 with NO DoT, so 18 is a generic aura range.

specialty.meaning: DoT damage (HP lost per tick by units inside the aura, id 18)
specialty.param_note: Param_2 = damage per tick (Amon = 200). Always paired with id 18 (the aura range); id 19 NEVER appears without 18. interval is in engine frames elsewhere; ref Amon DoT = 200減少/5f.

sample_expressions.expr: IsRace("エルフ","ハーフエルフ","ダークエルフ")
IsRace("エルフ","ハーフエルフ","ダークエルフ")

specialty.meaning: ATK buff to a specific enemy element (gradual, up to Param_1%)
specialty.param_note: Param_1 = max buff percent; _Expression names the target element (IsEnemyElementAny("X")). Often emitted by a hidden flag enemy that ramps the boss ATK over time (e.g. up to 3x on the dual majin advent).

specialty.meaning: enemy DEF buff aura to nearby enemies

specialty.param_note: Param_1 = 100 observed. Correlates with 麻痺無効/即死無効; assassination resistance is a SEPARATE field (Param_ResistanceAssassin), not this.

sample_expressions.expr: IsRace("デーモン")|| IsIdentitiy("アンデッド")
IsRace("デーモン","ハーフデーモン","天使")
IsEnemyRace("インセクト") || IsEnemyElementAny( "蟲使い") == 1
IsEnemyRace("インセクト") || IsEnemyElementAny( "蟲使い") == 1

term.meaning: enemy DEF buff (conditional, +Param_1% to elements in expr)
term.param_note: Param_1 = percent (400 = +400% / x5 DEF); gated by _Expression. On the dual advent: triggered while StageFlag 1 set (Chimeries present) and applies to アーマー element enemies.

term.meaning: enemy ATK buff (conditional, +Param_1% to elements in expr)
term.param_note: Param_1 = percent (300 = +300%); gated by _Expression. On the dual advent: triggered while StageFlag 8 set (Chimeries form3) for アーマー enemies. NOTE: in the SPECIALTY context id 18 is a DoT, not this.

sample_expressions.expr: IsEnemyElementAny( "魔森の狩人", "真なる狩人");

term.meaning: unit composition restriction (e.g. no duplicate units)
Makai miasma: ally ATK down by Param_1%
Makai miasma: ally DEF down by Param_1%
Makai miasma: ally cost natural-regen down by Param_1%
